name: Can I sue if AI referral firm in LA ghosted me after taking case?
description: Sue for abandonment if harmed; demand letter first in CA.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue if AI referral firm in LA ghosted me after taking case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue for abandonment if harmed; demand letter first in CA.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, for abandonment/breach if harm resulted. California requires diligent representation. Key factors: (1) Referral agreement terms; (2) Communication logs; (3) Prejudice shown. Send demand letter first. Statute 1-4 years.
